tensions.text: shape.cagr's derivation claims a tight 8-10% consensus band across 'three independent publishers,' but the fuller set of global rack/intelligent-PDU reports surfaced here spans a much wider range — from 5.4% (LP Information) and 6.8% (MarketIntelo; Global Industry Analysts) up to 19.5% (MarketsandMarkets, broader Data Center PDU scope) and even an internally-contradictory 3.52%/9.44% figure from Mordor's own Intelligent PDU report — undermining the tightness of the stated consensus.

tamBase's scope-down chain anchors on Grand View Research's $2.81B 2025 global rack-PDU figure, but other publishers report substantially different 2025 global market sizes for ostensibly the same category — Insight Partners $2.03B, LP Information $1.697B, MarketIntelo $3.2B, MarketsandMarkets (broader, rack+floor) $3.94B — implying the anchor carries more uncertainty than the stated ±40% sensitivity band reflects.

MarketsandMarkets' 'Data Center PDU' figure explicitly combines Rack PDU and Floor PDU segments and grows at 19.5% CAGR — a scope-contamination risk analogous to the BIS/R&M PDUs+PSUs ceiling that tamBase's refinement cycle 1 already flagged and excluded, suggesting similar caution is needed before treating any single global 'PDU market' headline number as clean rack-PDU-only data.

absences: No Central Europe-specific or country-level (Germany, Poland, CE-7) rack-PDU market size figure was found in the global-scope searches — only Germany-specific CAGR figures for the narrower Intelligent PDU sub-segment (5.2-5.3%) surfaced, not absolute size.

No source separated 'rack PDU' cleanly from 'floor PDU' or 'PDU+PSU' scope consistently — most reports mix definitions (MarketsandMarkets explicitly includes Floor PDU; BIS/R&M includes PSUs), so a scope-pure global or regional rack-PDU-only base figure remains unconfirmed.

No regional (Europe- or CE-specific) revenue-share breakdown was found for the rack-PDU category itself — only global NA (38%) and APAC (38.2%) shares were reported, leaving Europe's true share of the global rack-PDU pie unquantified directly.
No source reconciled the wide 2025 global market-size estimates ($1.7B-$3.94B) or explained the discrepancy; none of the reports cross-referenced competing figures.
